remarks: Set within Westport's most prestigious private estate enclave, surrounded by grand coastal estates and quintessential antique treasures, this exceptional Greens Farms 2+ acre* new construction offering is poised to become one of Fairfield County's most coveted addresses. Perfectly positioned, moments from beaches, downtown boutiques, vibrant dining scene, and just an express train to Manhattan, the property offers a rare blend of privacy, convenience, and timeless sophistication. Fully customizable and designed to fit your lifestyle and desired scale, this masterfully built residence will feature bespoke craftsmanship, rich stone, curated designer finishes, advanced smart home technology, and world-class amenities tailored entirely to your vision. Expansive grounds offer tranquil space for a private resort-style setting with endless possibilities for outdoor living and recreation. Walk the property with us and the Coastal Luxury Homes team and begin designing your dream estate.
